evals.prompt: Help me learn about fractions. I'm an adult refreshing my high school math. I want exercises I can practice with.
evals.expected_output: A diataxis.toml structure document and at least one content file per quadrant covering basic fractions, plus at least one marimo exercise notebook.

evals.prompt: Create diataxis documentation for this Python project
evals.expected_output: A diataxis.toml structure document and content files documenting the skill-diataxis project (its build pipeline, structure schema, scoring rubric, etc.)

evals.prompt: The tutorial on basic operations is too abstract. Use more concrete examples with real numbers. Also add a section about mixed numbers.
evals.expected_output: Updated diataxis.toml with guidance reflecting the feedback, revised tutorial with concrete numeric examples, and a new or expanded section on mixed numbers.

evals.prompt: I want to learn how to fine tune an LLM on my local computer. Teach me how.
evals.expected_output: A diataxis.toml structure covering LLM fine-tuning topics (dataset prep, model selection, training config, evaluation), content across all four quadrants, and interactive marimo exercise notebooks walking through each step.
